item.title: Abbreviated non-contrast magnetic resonance enterography for Crohn's disease: a reliability study.
item.description: La Radiologia medica - To evaluate the diagnostic reliability and time efficiency of an abbreviated non-contrast magnetic resonance enterography (MRE) protocol for assessing Crohn's disease activity. This retrospective s...

item.title: The Association of Faecal Calprotectin Measurements With Endo-Histological Remission in Ulcerative Colitis: A Pooled Analysis.
item.description: Alimentary pharmacology & therapeutics - Endoscopic and histologic evaluation is part of routine clinical practice to confirm the presence of active disease in ulcerative colitis. Faecal calprotectin (FCAL) levels show a positive correlat...
